system.description:
### Tier 4 Solo A terrifying, corrupted Asari that floats effortlessly, emitting a psychic scream and hurling biotic death. Motives & Tactics: Teleport, terrorize, deflect

#### Features Relentless (3): The Banshee can be spotlighted up to 3 times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

Biotic Blink - Movement: The Banshee does not move normally. She teleports to any location within Far range. This movement allows her to pass through obstacles.

Sonic Scream - Action: Spend 1 Fear. All PCs within Close range must make a Presence Reaction Roll. On a failure, they take 2d12 ene damage and mark 2 Stress. On a success, they only mark 1 Stress.

Hand of the Abyss - Action: The Banshee targets a Restrained or Vulnerable PC in Melee. The PC must make a Strength Reaction Roll. If they fail, they are instantly reduced to 0 HP and must make a Death Move.

Biotic Aegis - Reaction: When targeted by a Ranged Attack, the Banshee may spend 1 Stress to deflect it. The ranged attack has now Disadvantage.

}}
